parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM opportunities WHERE discovered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS new_opps_24h,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM entities WHERE first_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS new_entities_24h,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM captures WHERE captured_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS new_captures_24h,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM opportunities) AS total_opps,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM entities) AS total_entities,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE active = true) AS active_projects,
  pg_database_size('workhorse') / 1024 / 1024 AS db_size_mb;
